org.bukkit.entity

Enum Arrow.PickupStatus

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<Arrow.PickupStatus>
      • org.bukkit.entity.Arrow.PickupStatus
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<Arrow.PickupStatus>
    Enclosing interface:
    Arrow

    public static enum Arrow.PickupStatus
extends Enum<Arrow.PickupStatus>
    Represents the pickup status of this arrow.

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      ALLOWED
      The arrow can be picked up.
      CREATIVE_ONLY
      The arrow can only be picked up by players in creative mode.
      DISALLOWED
      The arrow cannot be picked up.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Arrow.PickupStatus valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static Arrow.PickupStatus[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • DISALLOWED

        public static final Arrow.PickupStatus DISALLOWED
        The arrow cannot be picked up.

      • ALLOWED

        public static final Arrow.PickupStatus ALLOWED
        The arrow can be picked up.

      • CREATIVE_ONLY

        public static final Arrow.PickupStatus CREATIVE_ONLY
        The arrow can only be picked up by players in creative mode.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static Arrow.PickupStatus[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (Arrow.PickupStatus c : Arrow.PickupStatus.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static Arrow.PickupStatus valueOf(String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        NullPointerException - if the argument is null
